Document:
# Synthetic Lifeforms
Certain species are Synthetic Lifeforms, as opposed to Organic. Synthetics are defined by being partially or totally electronic and being artificial in nature or modified.
Synthetics may require extra attention when being treated. They may not respond to organic medicine, or may respond better to synthetic medicines.
All Synthetics respond to synthetic medicines.
Synthetic Medicines and Reagents usually fall under the Software, Malware, or Industrial metabolism types.
## Common Synthetic Medicines
[textlink="Click here to see a complete list of synthetic reagents." link="Synthetic"]
## I.P.C. Repair
As I.P.C.s have been deemed lifeforms, their health falls under the purview of the Medical department.
[bold]No Organic treatment works for I.P.C.s[/bold]
[color=red][bold]Do NOT use a defibrillator on an I.P.C.,[/bold][/color] as this will cause the battery to discharge energy rays outward!
A dead I.P.C. can be safely [color=yellow]Restart[/color]ed once sufficiently repaired.
A series of common I.P.C. repair tools can be found in the Medical bay. They can be crafted in the [color=cyan]Medical TechFab[/color], or can be purchased via Cargo.
In a pinch, an I.P.C. can be repaired with any [color=yellow]Welder[/color].
A set of more complex I.P.C. repair tools can be made by a Chemist with a [color=yellow]Microwave[/color].
[textlink="Click here to see a complete list of recipes." link="MedicinalRecipes"]
